content:
# Session 43 — recommendations

## Next iter (044)
- **Default: another no-prover-lane closeout.** No closable in-cone sorry exists; the leg is delivered
  axiom-clean and awaiting merge. Continue the mechanical no-dispatch unless a reverse signal arrives.
- **Reverse signals that would change the call:**
  1. USER_HINTS opens the cohomology/χ scope (would unblock `QuotScheme.lean` 4 χ sorries + downstream
     `sectionGradedModule_fg` / `hilbertPoly_of_sectionModule`).
  2. A genuine new in-cone sorry surfaces from a Lean edit (impossible without a commit beyond `c53d9c9`).

## Do NOT
- Do NOT dispatch a prover at the leandag "Ready to prove" `def:` nodes — they already compile axiom-clean
  (anonymous-instance / abstract-concept `\lean{}` pins sync_leanok cannot resolve).
- Do NOT re-probe the 4 χ sorries — genuinely cohomology/Snapper-gated.
- Do NOT edit inherited out-of-cone blueprint chapters (`Cohomology_FlatBaseChange`, `Picard_GlueDescent`,
  `Picard_QuotScheme`) to fix broken `\ref`/`\uses` — resolve at merge.
- Do NOT split the 4k-line sorry-free `SectionGradedRing.lean` for "parallelism" — no unproved theorems.

## Merge-time (deferred, with reason)
- 2 phantom covers + ~30 broken cross-refs in dormant inherited chapters (blueprint-doctor iter-043).
- ~356 `lean_aux` unmatched extraction artifacts.
- Anonymous-instance / abstract-concept `\lean{}` pin reconciliation against parent's canonical labels.
- `RelativeSpec.lean` out-of-cone sorries.
